overview: White Shark is a SubBoss-class Beast monster found in Ship Graveyard. 3 grades: Common, Elite, Nightmare. Base stats (Common): 600 HP, 26 physical damage, 300 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 999, MaxImpactEndurance 999. 4 attacks, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: L at 150% ratio (390 base damage).

phases.name: Combat
phases.description: 4 attacks. Primary: L (150%), R (150%), L Shake (20%).

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

status_effects_detail.name: Bite
status_effects_detail.counter: Watch for the Bite icon on your status bar.

strategies.title: High Impact Values (ImpactRes 999, Endurance 999)
strategies.description: ImpactResistance 999 and MaxImpactEndurance 999. This monster does not have a Staggered ability in its ability set.

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
ai_perception.stuck_description: Has stuck-detection failsafes in behavior tree.
